title: Configurable Salt Height [BEWITCHMENT ADDON]
description: This mod adds a configurable number for what height the salt barrier should be, from 2 high (the default) to whatever number you want!
body:
This mod adds a new config file with just one number to change, the height of the salt barrier.



IF YOU DONT KNOW WHAT SALT DOES IN BEWITCHMENT:

Salt is a block similar to redsone wire that is white and can stop evil creatures from going over it, it does that by making 1 block above it and itself have collision, players could also become, for example, a vampire, and being a vampire means you also cant cross the salt, if you try to break it, you receive a lot of damage. 



WHAT THE MOD DOES:

This mod makes it so that you can increase the collision height, so default is 2 (1 block above salt + the salt block itself) and if you set it to three, then the collision box goes to in total, 3 blocks tall. there is no limit on what the number can be.



DISCLAIMER, READ BEFORE DOWNLOAD!

This mod is technically possible to be only serverside, but having it only be serverside means that the client doesnt know that the collision box is x high, meaning that some funky stuff can happen, its not too bad though so feel free to just keep serverside.

If you do however, have it server and client side, the config files from the server and the player connecting MUST MATCH UP, if the client has, for example, a salt height of 4, and the server of the default 2, then the server will think the player is flying if theyre standing on top of the salt, so OR make the server height higher than the client side OR dont install it client side if you are only gonna connect to servers.



I know, lots of words, but ask chatgpt to summarize or something idk.



WHY DID YOU MAKE THIS?

cause I thought the base salt was not good enough cause you can just build over it.



Join the [Discord!](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d) You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code)

Or donate to my [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/bikerboys) incase you are feeling generous! 






REQUIRES [BEWITCHMENT](https://modrinth.com/mod/bewitchment)

I want to give a big thanks to Beschmirchment for being open source, allowing me to look at it and take the gradle.properties and build.gradle stuff from it.
